results.description: Verify two ConfigLoader classes and shim imports are present.
results.command: class_count=$(rg -n "^class ConfigLoader" cohort_projections/utils/config_loader.py libs/project_utils/project_utils/config.py | wc -l); shim_count=$(rg -n "ConfigLoader as _LocalConfigLoader|from project_utils import ConfigLoader as _ConfigLoader" cohort_projections/utils/__init__.py | wc -l); echo "CONFIGLOADER_CLASS_COUNT=$class_count"; echo "CONFIGLOADER_SHIM_IMPORTS=$shim_count"; if [ "$class_count" -eq 2 ] && [ "$shim_count" -ge 2 ]; then echo "ASSERTION=PASS"; else echo "ASSERTION=FAIL"; exit 1; fi
